# Scholarly Report

Use this fallback template only if the structured issue forms do not fit the report.

## Work and Version

Identify the manuscript, page, repository file, or deployment surface.

## Location

Provide the section, theorem, definition, equation, page number, URL, or file path.

## Report

State the error, ambiguity, broken link, citation mismatch, deployment issue, or technical question.

## Proposed Correction or Next Step

Give corrected wording, metadata, link, or verification steps if known.

## Consequences

Note whether the report affects later results, public summaries, DOI metadata, BibTeX, feed entries, sitemap entries, downloads, or the corpus-query interface.
